notes.heading: Local Join in the footer
notes.body: The bottom-left footer now shows the LAN address with the effective Dragonwilds launch port.

notes.heading: Internet Join in the footer
notes.body: The app also resolves and shows the public server address with the same dedicated server port.

notes.heading: Copy shortcuts
notes.body: Each join address has a copy button so players can quickly copy the Local Join or Internet Join value.
